1.arabic: بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم سبح اسم ربك الأعلى
1.english: Exalt the name of your Lord, the Most High,
And who brings out the pasture
We will make you recite, [O Muhammad], and you will not forget,

1.arabic: إلا ما شاء الله ۚ إنه يعلم الجهر وما يخفى
1.english: Except what Allah should will. Indeed, He knows what is declared and what is hidden.
1.transliteration: Illaa maa shaaa'al laah; innahoo ya'lamul jahra wa maa yakhfaa

1.english: And We will ease you toward ease.
So remind, if the reminder should benefit;
He who fears [Allah] will be reminded.
But the wretched one will avoid it -
[He] who will [enter and] burn in the greatest Fire,

1.arabic: ثم لا يموت فيها ولا يحيى
1.transliteration: Summa laa yamootu feehaa wa laa yahyaa

1.english: He has certainly succeeded who purifies himself
And mentions the name of his Lord and prays.
But you prefer the worldly life,
While the Hereafter is better and more enduring.
Indeed, this is in the former scriptures,
1.transliteration: Inna haazaa lafis suhu fil oolaa

1.english: The scriptures of Abraham and Moses.
